title: Joe Hunter
compiled_truth: Joe Hunter is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-03-23 to 2002-03-01), Joe Hunter sent 4 and received 179 emails, totalling 183 interactions. Top correspondents: [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (1), [S  Pollan](people/s-pollan) (1), [Diane Anderson](people/diane-anderson) (1), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (1), [Patrick Ryder](people/patrick-ryder) (1).
